data.description: Hybrid Software Group PLC reports: 17% rise in adjusted operating profit and 252% surge in net cash in 2025.

data.title: Alkimi's AdFi aims to bring transparency to online ads, combating wasted millions on unseen ads.
data.description: Millions of dollars are invested by advertisers in online ads that might not reach actual users. Alkimi's goal is to bring transparency to the online advertising industry, which is a crucial market involving significant financial transactions.

data.title: Senate passes CBDC ban as part of housing bill with strong support. Obstacles remain for bill to become law.
data.description: The bill proposing a ban on Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) is still encountering challenges in the legislative process before potentially becoming law. Despite gaining some support, the bill is facing obstacles in the House of Representatives and also at the White House, where further deliberations and negotiations are deemed necessary. The proposed ban on CBDC is a contentious issue, with the bill's journey towards enactment still uncertain as it navigates through the legislative hurdles.

data.title: L.B. Foster Company to Present Virtually at Sidoti Small Cap Conference on March 19, 2026
data.description: In Pittsburgh, on March 12, 2026, L.B. Foster Company shared that their President and CEO, John Kasel, and Executive VP and CFO, Bill Thalman, are set to present at the Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 19, 2026, at 10:45 AM ET. The company, listed as Nasdaq: FSTR, will provide presentation materials on their Investor Relations website under "Presentations" on the morning of the conference.

data.description: Ilkka Oyj announced on March 12, 2026, that they have completed the acquisition of their own shares at the stock exchange release time of 07:00 p.m. EET.

data.title: BlackRock's $55B Bitcoin ETF Success Continues With Staked Ethereum Launch
data.description: BlackRock debuted the iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF on Nasdaq (ticker: ETHB), offering exposure to spot Ethereum (ETH) along with staking rewards. This new ETF, BlackRock's third in the crypto space, is the first to integrate staking. The fund not only holds spot Ethereum but also stakes a portion of the holdings on the Ethereum network, providing investors with both rewards and exposure to price movements. This move caters to institutional demand for crypto yield. Jay Jacobs, BlackRock's U.S. head of equity ETFs, noted that the ETF addresses a gap that deterred crypto-native investors from entering ETFs. The launch aims to attract investors who were previously hesitant to switch from directly holding and staking ether to exchange-traded products.

data.title: Brace Yourselves, Bitcoin And Ethereum Holders—Here's How Low Crypto May Still Go
data.description: Renowned crypto analyst Trader Mayne has forecasted potential downward trends for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) before favorable long-term buying opportunities arise. Mayne suggested that Bitcoin may experience another 20% drop as it currently remains within a disrupted higher-timeframe structure, indicating the possibility of further declines before stabilizing. He compared the current scenario to a previous cycle where Bitcoin faced a significant breakdown, leading to a downfall of over 20% over several months. Referring to historical data and a crucial yearly order block, Mayne predicted that Bitcoin could decrease towards the $48,000 range, representing around a 60% correction from its peak. This analysis is available in depth on Benzinga.com.
Oil Plunges 30% From Peak, Yet Prices At The Pump Keep Rising: Who Is Profiting Here?

data.title: One Model Reports Record 2025 Momentum as CHROs Call Out a Productivity-Data Blind Spot
data.description: In Austin, Texas, One Model, the leading People Analytics platform for businesses, reported significant progress in 2025. They experienced impressive momentum with increased enterprise usage, strong customer retention, expanding global market presence, and notable advancements in AI governance for workforce decisions. This success coincides with a growing demand from HR executives to provide clearer insights into productivity, performance, and return on investment within the workforce. Boards and CEOs are seeking more transparency, while many CHROs point to data quality as a key challenge.

data.title: Cleverbridge Recognized by ETA for Enabling Modern Software Commerce
data.description: Cleverbridge has recently been recognized as one of the top Payment Independent Software Vendors (ISVs) by the Electronic Transactions Association (ETA). This acknowledgment highlights the importance of robust payment capabilities in current software commerce practices. Cleverbridge, a company based in Cologne, Germany, and Chicago, was selected as a leading player in the industry, showcasing their expertise in facilitating transactions smoothly. This recognition solidifies their position in the market, indicating their significant contribution to the sector. It emphasizes the crucial role that efficient payment solutions play in the success of software companies in the contemporary business environment.

data.title: DeepTech Company Zander Labs Enters the U.S. Market With Groundbreaking pBCI Technology
data.description: A neuroadaptive AI company, Zander Labs, based in the Netherlands and Germany, is expanding into the U.S. market. Specializing in passive brain-computer interfaces (pBCI) and human-computer interactive technology, the company aims to provide its innovative technology to a wider array of sectors, including defense, mobility, robotics, healthcare, and other human-centered AI applications. The move is intended to cater to highly specialized roles like air traffic controllers.

data.title: Introducing Robot-to-Robot Communication: How Chef Robots Coordinate to Maximize Throughput
data.description: In San Francisco on March 12, 2026, Chef Robotics unveiled a significant development in physical AI for the food sector. The company introduced robot-to-robot (R2R) communication technology, allowing numerous Chef robots operating on a common conveyor line to synchronize deposits. This innovation is designed to enhance efficiency and throughput on fast-paced production lines.

data.title: Veteran Litigators Nicole T. LeBoeuf and Amy S. Ooi Join Hallett & Perrin
data.description: Esteemed lawyers Nicole T. LeBoeuf and Amy S. Ooi have joined the Dallas firm Hallett & Perrin to enhance its commercial litigation services. This expansion of the firm's bench comes as part of their ongoing efforts to bolster their legal team. The addition of these experienced attorneys signifies the firm's commitment to providing top-tier services in commercial litigation. The move reflects Hallett & Perrin's dedication to leveraging the expertise of legal professionals to further strengthen their position in the market.

data.title: Seed Junky Genetics Announces Exclusive Arizona Licensing Agreement with Halo Cannabis
data.description: In a recent development, Seed Junky Genetics has formed a strategic partnership with Halo Cannabis, making Halo the exclusive authorized operator in Arizona. This move signifies a significant expansion of Seed Junky's regional licensing model. The agreement, announced on March 12, 2026, establishes Halo Cannabis as the sole licensee, solidifying their position in the market. This exclusive partnership highlights the growing trend of collaborations in the cannabis industry.

DIESEL HITS $5+ IN 8 STATES, CALIFORNIA TOPS $6 GasBuddy reports that 8 U.S. states now have average diesel prices above $5 per gallon, with California soaring to $6.16. Other affected states include WA, WI, OR, PA, FL, VT, and ME.
